response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of broad full-stack engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput systems (Dunnhumby/Sociomantic micro-services handling millions of requests/sec), plus a CS degree and demonstrated systemic thinking (open-source platforms, test frameworks, dev tooling). However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, A/B testing, telemetry/metrics infrastructure, or statistical/bias-detection work — all central to this Principal/IC6 Growth role. Title history tops out at Staff/Senior, with limited evidence of Principal-level cross-org influence on measurement systems.
strengths: 13+ years across diverse stacks with proven low-latency, high-scale service experience at Sociomantic
Strong software-craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, own test framework
Demonstrated systemic thinking — built platforms, frameworks, and dev tooling reused across teams
concerns: No experimentation platform, feature-flagging, or A/B testing experience listed
No clear telemetry/metrics infrastructure or statistical analysis / bias-detection background
Career level appears Staff/Senior; limited evidence of IC6/Principal cross-org influence

key_factors.factor: Strong scale and systems engineering background
